vocab.meaning: cảm giác về xúc giác (khi chạm vào)
vocab.example: I gravitate towards physical books because I cherish the tactile sensation of flipping through the pages.

vocab.meaning: sự mỏi mắt do sử dụng thiết bị điện tử
vocab.example: Reading on a screen for prolonged periods often leads to digital eyestrain, which is why I prefer hardbacks.

vocab.meaning: khả năng mang theo tiện lợi không gì sánh bằng
vocab.example: E-readers offer unrivaled portability, allowing me to carry an entire library in my backpack.

vocab.meaning: màn hình không nhấp nháy (giúp bảo vệ mắt)
vocab.example: Modern tablets with a flicker-free display have made reading digital magazines much more comfortable.
There is something incredibly nostalgic and soothing about the distinct scent of a new book.

vocab.meaning: đồng bộ hóa một cách mượt mà
vocab.example: I love how e-books seamlessly sync across all my devices, so I can pick up right where I left off.
Switching to digital copies helps me keep my living space clutter-free without sacrificing my love for reading.

vocab.meaning: những ghi chép bên lề sách
vocab.example: I find that writing marginalia in a physical book helps me engage more deeply with the author's arguments.

vocab.meaning: màn hình độ phân giải cao
vocab.example: A high-resolution screen is essential for me when reading graphic novels to appreciate the intricate artwork.

vocab.meaning: giá trị về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: Printed books possess an aesthetic value that makes them look beautiful on a bookshelf, unlike digital files.
